cards.back: A sequence of productions that are applied to a right-hand side of a production in order to derive the left-hand side.

cards.front: What is an SDD (Single-Ended Depth-First) parsing strategy?
cards.back: A parsing strategy that traverses the parse tree from the leftmost non-terminal to the rightmost non-terminal.
A sequence of productions that are applied to a single non-terminal to derive a right-hand side.
A derivation where the last step involves replacing the rightmost non-terminal with its right-hand side.
A derivation where the first step involves replacing the leftmost non-terminal with its left-hand side.
